headline: a smart model on bad context just pattern-matches
sub: Apple's 'illusion of thinking': perturb a problem's surface, keep the logic identical, and accuracy drops. Bad context in, confident wrong answer out.
My run on a fresh project. Your repo, your number. The figure I quote publicly stays a conservative ~60%.

headline: the fleet grew its own immune system
sub: One agent catches and fixes another's mistake before I even see it. Shared memory plus review gates.

headline: big repos quietly wreck your token bill
sub: Serve one scoped slice per query and meter the cost per lookup. Don't dump the whole repo into the window.

cols.head: THE ONE TEAMS SKIP
cols.body: observability: what did our agents do last week, and what did it cost?
